response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the song title from the top-left on-screen text: 'Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!'. 2. Performed search '"Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!" Japanese and English lyrics'. 3. Confirmed it is an original song from the 'Uma Musume Pretty Derby' franchise. 4. Identified the virtual idols performing the cover: Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka, and Yukihana Lamy. 5. Mapped the scenes: 00:00-03:01 is the musical performance, 03:01-05:01 is dialogue. 6. Provided partial lyrics for the song based on the performance.
response.global_summary: A concert performance by four virtual idols (Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka, and Yukihana Lamy) followed by a comedic dialogue segment. The song performed is 'Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!' from the 'Uma Musume Pretty Derby' franchise.

scenes.description: Virtual idols perform the song 'Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!' on a concert stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan, Omaru Polka, Yukihana Lamy
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Partial lyrics)
さあ目指すはスーパースター
意味なんて　打ちギターの後で
ついてくる
勝ちたい！そうこれは本能
走りたい！止まない衝動
叫びたい！勝利の雄叫びを
轟け！

Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!
(Go for it!)
追い越して　追い越して
涙さえ振り切って
前に足を出した　悩む暇なんてない
答えを！
出すのはゴールした後でも遅くない
Go Fight!! 抗えぬ本能
轟け！譲れない頂上
叫びたい！王者の雄叫びに
続け！
Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Partial translation)
Come on, aim to be a superstar
Meaning? Who cares, the guitar follows after
Let's win, this is just instinct
Let's run, unstoppable impulse
Let's shout, a victory shout
Roar!

Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!
(Go for it!)
Overcome it, overcome it
Even if I feel anxious, I just move forward
There's no time to worry, just answer
Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!
(Go for it!)
Even if you're behind at the goal, it's not too late
Go for it, counter instinct
Resonate, surrenderless peak, shout it out
Let's continue!
Ready!! Steady!! Derby!!

scenes.description: The music stops, and the four characters engage in comedic dialogue in a pool setting.
